name: Sweet and Sour Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into 1 1/2 cm cubes.
2. Heat oil in a wok, add garlic, and cook for 30 seconds. Remove garlic and discard.
3. Add tofu to the wok in batches and stir-fry gently until lightly browned. Remove tofu from the wok.
4. Add green beans, onion, and carrot to the wok and stir-fry until vegetables are almost tender.
5. Add broccoli, celery, and shallots, along with tamarind sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, light soy sauce, sweet chilli sauce, tomato paste, sugar, white vinegar, ground star anise, and cornflour mixed with water. Stir-fry for 2 minutes until the sauce boils and thickens slightly.
6. Return the tofu to the wok and stir gently until the sauce has boiled and thickened.
Makes 6 servings.
Best made just before serving.
Freeze: Not suitable
Microwave: Not suitable
Edited by Maryanne Blacker, The Australian Women's Weekly Home Library, 1991.
